parsed_review.summary: CP00-756 is a descriptor-only RP25 Migration Platform scope-contract foundation pack (150 units, risk C, RP25.P00.M00.S01-RP25.P01.M02.S08). Read-only inspection confirms the pack's claims are supported and not overclaimed. Coverage: deliverable/phase/micro-phase/micro-title distributions match across prompt, manifest, review-baseline, and packages/migration/src/registry.js requirements; validateMigrationPlatformCp756ScopeContractFoundationCoverage and validateMigrationPlatformCp756ScopeContractFoundationDescriptor enforce this and pass (math reconciles to 122 RP25.P00 + 28 RP25.P01 = 150). Honesty: manifest production_ready=false, runtime_ready=false, implementation_layer=descriptor, descriptor_only=true, writes_product_state=false — consistent across manifest, command-evidence, construction-inspection, adjudication.md, and claude-review-result.json; no runtime or enterprise-trust claim is made. Boundaries are enforced in code and validators: Claude is read-only and non-final (claude_is_final_approval=false, promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false, allowed_tools=[Read,Grep,Glob]); human approval is required before any runtime opening (deferred to CP00-757/RP25.P01.M02.S09); a comprehensive no-write/no-real-data attestation is applied to every row (no raw/source-system/credential/real-client payloads); Hermes is used only as a descriptor-only review/evidence packet shape (emits_runtime_receipt=false, hermes_packet_body_included=false) and is not embedded in product runtime; file server/SharePoint/Drive/iManage/import runtimes are all closed. Tests and validation pass: npm test 2952 pass / 0 fail, migration model.test.js 4 pass / 0 fail, and every required validation command (closeout-pack-plan:validate, closeout-pack:validate, validate, spec:requirements:validate, weighted:validate, fullplan:validate, goal:closeout:validate, rp00:control-plane:validate, rp25 validators) plus git diff --check exit 0; no 'not ok' or non-zero exits exist in command-evidence. The only filesystem write is the control-plane contract artifact contracts/migration-platform-contract.json produced by scripts/validate-rp25-migration-platform-contract.mjs, which mirrors the deterministic generator output and matches test expectations; this is consistent with sibling RP23/RP24 validators and sits outside the product-state no-write scope. CP178+ review-hardening preconditions hold: prompt contains no full source/diff (2730 bytes), read-only tools only, forbidden tools absent, summary-only review prohibited and not used, and the readiness auth preflight passed with valid JSON (exit 0, 1436-byte stdout). Pending receipt states (review_receipt_ref=null, valid_review_receipts=[], status pending/in_progress) are the expected pre-adjudication condition that this single valid read-only receipt is meant to satisfy, not a defect. No P0/P1/P2/P3 issues identified. This receipt is an independent read-only review and not final human/enterprise-trust approval, which remains correctly reserved outside this receipt.
